title: Redis Stream Entry Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for a Redis Streams entry, consisting of a millisecond-timestamp ID and field-value pairs.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Stream entry ID in format <millisecondsTime>-<sequenceNumber> (e.g., 1526919030474-55). Auto-generated by Redis when * is passed.

fields.name: fields
fields.description: Key-value pairs forming the stream entry payload. Redis stores all field values as strings.
